nasb.text: Benjamin went out against them from Gibeah the second day and felled to the ground again 18,000 men of the sons of Israel; all these drew the sword.

esv.text: And Benjamin went against them out of Gibeah the second day, and destroyed 18,000 men of the people of Israel. All these were men who drew the sword.

cnv.text: 便雅憫人第二天也從基比亞出來，迎戰以色列人，又使一萬八千以色列人倒地身亡，都是拿刀的。

ccb.text: 便雅悯人从基比亚出来迎战，又杀了以色列军一万八千刀兵。
